languages.text: "Успею еще тряпки сменить. Здесь порядок важнее". {n}Он стучит по инфопластине в разводах крови.{/n} "Не дай Бог-Император, железные твари снова нагрянут, а у бойцов в животе, что у комиссара в голове. На Заркове как шутят — искупление для одного, а жрать надо всем".

traits.locale_text: "Успею еще тряпки сменить. Здесь порядок важнее". {n}Он стучит по инфопластине в разводах крови.{/n} "Не дай Бог-Император, железные твари снова нагрянут, а у бойцов в животе, что у комиссара в голове. На Заркове как шутят — искупление для одного, а жрать надо всем".

languages.text: "I'll change my rags later when I have the time. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood too.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the troops' bellies are as empty as a Commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."
languages.original_text: "Успею еще тряпки сменить. Здесь порядок важнее". {n}Он стучит по инфопластине в разводах крови.{/n} "Не дай Бог-Император, железные твари снова нагрянут, а у бойцов в животе, что у комиссара в голове. На Заркове как шутят — искупление для одного, а жрать надо всем".

traits.locale_text: "I'll have time to change my rags later. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the lads' guts are as empty as a commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

"I'll have time to change my rags later. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

"I'll change my rags later when I have the time. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood too.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the troops' bellies are as empty as a commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

languages.text: “等我有空了再换掉这身破烂。在这里，最重要的就是秩序。”{n}他敲了敲同样糊满血污的数据板。{/n}“要是那些铁畜生再杀回来，士兵们的肚子却空得跟政委的脑壳似的，那只能求神皇保佑了。扎尔科夫流传着一个笑话：赎罪是一个人的事，口粮是大家的事。”
languages.original_text: "I'll change my rags later when I have the time. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood too.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the troops' bellies are as empty as a commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

traits.locale_text: “等我有空了再换掉这身破烂。在这里，最重要的就是秩序。”{n}他敲了敲同样糊满血污的数据板。{/n}“要是那些铁畜生再杀回来，士兵们的肚子却空得跟政委的脑壳似的，那只能求神皇保佑了。扎尔科夫流传着一个笑话：赎罪是一个人的事，口粮是大家的事。”

languages.text: "Vaktim olduğunda paçavralarımı değiştireceğim. Burada önemli olan düzendir." {n}Üzerine kan bulaşmış databelasına vuruyor.{/n} "Demir yaratıklar geri dönerse ve birliklerin midesi bir komiserin kafası kadar boş olursa Tanrı İmparator yardımcımız olsun. Zarkov'da bir söz vardır: Kefaret sona kalana olsa da erzak herkese lazımdır."
languages.original_text: "I'll change my rags later when I have the time. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood too.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the troops' bellies are as empty as a commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

traits.locale_text: "Vaktim olduğunda paçavralarımı değiştireceğim. Burada önemli olan düzendir." {n}Üzerine kan bulaşmış databelasına vuruyor.{/n} "Demir yaratıklar geri dönerse ve birliklerin midesi bir komiserin kafası kadar boş olursa Tanrı İmparator yardımcımız olsun. Zarkov'da bir söz vardır: Kefaret sona kalana olsa da erzak herkese lazımdır."

languages.text: « Je me changerai quand j'aurai le temps. Il y a plus important à faire pour le moment, » {n}dit-il en tapotant sur sa plaque de données, qui est elle aussi couverte de sang.{/n} « Que l'Empereur-Dieu nous vienne en aide si ces bêtes de métal reviennent alors que les troupes ont le ventre aussi vide que la tête d'un commissaire. Expiation pour un seul, mais rations pour tous, comme on dit pour plaisanter sur Zarkov. »
languages.original_text: "I'll change my rags later when I have the time. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood too.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the troops' bellies are as empty as a commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

traits.locale_text: « Je me changerai quand j'aurai le temps. Il y a plus important à faire pour le moment, » {n}dit-il en tapotant sur sa plaque de données, qui est elle aussi couverte de sang.{/n} « Que l'Empereur-Dieu nous vienne en aide si ces bêtes de métal reviennent alors que les troupes ont le ventre aussi vide que la tête d'un commissaire. Expiation pour un seul, mais rations pour tous, comme on dit pour plaisanter sur Zarkov. »

languages.text: «Me quitaré estos harapos cuando tenga tiempo. Lo que importa es imponer el orden». {n}Toca la tablilla de datos, que también está cubierta de sangre.{/n} «Si esas bestias de metal vuelven y las tropas tienen el estómago tan vacío como la cabeza de un comisario, que el Dios Emperador nos ampare. Hay un dicho en Zarkov: La expiación es para el último, pero las raciones son para todos».
languages.original_text: "I'll change my rags later when I have the time. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood too.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the troops' bellies are as empty as a commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

traits.locale_text: «Me quitaré estos harapos cuando tenga tiempo. Lo que importa es imponer el orden». {n}Toca la tablilla de datos, que también está cubierta de sangre.{/n} «Si esas bestias de metal vuelven y las tropas tienen el estómago tan vacío como la cabeza de un comisario, que el Dios Emperador nos ampare. Hay un dicho en Zarkov: La expiación es para el último, pero las raciones son para todos».

languages.text: "Ich werde mich später umziehen, wenn ich Zeit habe. Eines nach dem anderen." {n}Er tippt auf den ebenfalls blutverschmierten Datablock.{/n} "Der Gottimperator stehe uns bei, falls diese Eisenbestien zurückkehren und die Bäuche der Soldaten so leer sind wie der Kopf eines Kommissars. Es gibt auf Zarkov einen Witz: Sühne für den Einzelnen, aber Rationen für alle."
languages.original_text: "I'll change my rags later when I have the time. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood too.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the troops' bellies are as empty as a commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde mich später umziehen, wenn ich Zeit habe. Eines nach dem anderen." {n}Er tippt auf den ebenfalls blutverschmierten Datablock.{/n} "Der Gottimperator stehe uns bei, falls diese Eisenbestien zurückkehren und die Bäuche der Soldaten so leer sind wie der Kopf eines Kommissars. Es gibt auf Zarkov einen Witz: Sühne für den Einzelnen, aber Rationen für alle."

languages.text: 「汚れた服は後で着替える。秩序が大事だ。」{n}彼は血まみれのデータスレートを叩く。{/n}「鉄の獣が戻ってきたら、神皇帝が助けてくれるだろう。兵士の腹はコミッサールの頭と同じくらい空っぽだ。ザルコフの冗談だ。贖罪は一人だが、食料は全員だ。」
languages.original_text: "I'll change my rags later when I have the time. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood too.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the troops' bellies are as empty as a Commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."

traits.locale_text: 「汚れた服は後で着替える。秩序が大事だ。」{n}彼は血まみれのデータスレートを叩く。{/n}「鉄の獣が戻ってきたら、神皇帝が助けてくれるだろう。兵士の腹はコミッサールの頭と同じくらい空っぽだ。ザルコフの冗談だ。贖罪は一人だが、食料は全員だ。」
